targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Rides" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date);
SELECT ROUND((COALESCE(SUM(distance_m), 0) / 1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Distance" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date);
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(elevation_m), 0)::numeric, 0) AS "Elevation" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date);
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(duration_s), 0) AS "Duration" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date);
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(calories), 0) AS "Calories" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND calories IS NOT NULL;

panels.title: Form (TSB)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(tsb::numeric, 1) AS "TSB" FROM athlete_stats ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1;

panels.description:
Training Stress Balance (Form)

CTL minus ATL — are you fresh or fatigued?

🔴 < -10 — Overreached, need rest

🟠 -10 to 0 — Tired, normal training fatigue

🟢 0 to 15 — Optimal, good balance

🔵 > 15 — Fresh, race-ready (fitness may be declining)

panels.title: Est. FTP
panels.description:
Functional Threshold Power

The power you can sustain for ~1 hour.

Estimated as 95% of your best 20-minute

average power from the last 90 days.

Anchors all power zones and TSS calculations.

Override with VELOAI_FTP env var if known.

panels.title: CTL / ATL / TSB

targets.rawSql: SELECT date AS "time", ctl AS "Fitness (CTL)", atl AS "Fatigue (ATL)", tsb AS "Form (TSB)" FROM athlete_stats WHERE $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date;

panels.description:
Fitness Curves

🔵 CTL (Chronic Training Load) — 42-day rolling fitness.

🟠 ATL (Acute Training Load) — 7-day rolling fatigue.

🟢 TSB (Form) — CTL minus ATL.

CTL rising = getting fitter.

ATL spiking = recent hard training.

TSB negative = fatigued, positive = fresh.

panels.title: Outdoor Records

targets.rawSql:
SELECT m.* FROM (
SELECT 1 AS ord, 'Longest Ride' AS "Metric",
  CASE WHEN ROUND(MAX(distance_m/1000.0)::numeric, 1) IS NULL THEN 'No data' WHEN ROUND(MAX(distance_m/1000.0)::numeric, 1) > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(distance_m/1000.0)::numeric FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND distance_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▲ ' || ROUND(MAX(distance_m/1000.0)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km' WHEN ROUND(MAX(distance_m/1000.0)::numeric, 1) < COALESCE((SELECT MAX(distance_m/1000.0)::numeric FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND distance_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▼ ' || ROUND(MAX(distance_m/1000.0)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km' ELSE ROUND(MAX(distance_m/1000.0)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km' END AS "Period Best",
  (SELECT COALESCE(ROUND((MAX(distance_m)/1000.0)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND distance_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE) AS "Previous Period Best",
  (SELECT COALESCE(ROUND((MAX(distance_m)/1000.0)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE distance_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE) AS "All Time Best"
  FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND distance_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE
UNION ALL SELECT 2, 'Most Elevation',
  CASE WHEN ROUND(MAX(elevation_m)::numeric, 0) IS NULL THEN 'No data' WHEN ROUND(MAX(elevation_m)::numeric, 0) > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(elevation_m)::numeric FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND elevation_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▲ ' || ROUND(MAX(elevation_m)::numeric, 0)::text || ' m' WHEN ROUND(MAX(elevation_m)::numeric, 0) < COALESCE((SELECT MAX(elevation_m)::numeric FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND elevation_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▼ ' || ROUND(MAX(elevation_m)::numeric, 0)::text || ' m' ELSE ROUND(MAX(elevation_m)::numeric, 0)::text || ' m' END,
  (SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(MAX(elevation_m)::numeric, 0)::text || ' m', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND elevation_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE),
  (SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(MAX(elevation_m)::numeric, 0)::text || ' m', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE elevation_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE)
  FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND elevation_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE
UNION ALL SELECT 3, 'Longest Duration',
  CASE WHEN MAX(duration_s) IS NULL THEN 'No data' WHEN MAX(duration_s) > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(duration_s) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND duration_s > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▲ ' || TO_CHAR(MAX(duration_s) * interval '1 second', 'HH24:MI:SS') WHEN MAX(duration_s) < COALESCE((SELECT MAX(duration_s) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND duration_s > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▼ ' || TO_CHAR(MAX(duration_s) * interval '1 second', 'HH24:MI:SS') ELSE TO_CHAR(MAX(duration_s) * interval '1 second', 'HH24:MI:SS') END,
  (SELECT COALESCE(TO_CHAR(MAX(duration_s) * interval '1 second', 'HH24:MI:SS'), 'No data') FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND duration_s > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE),
  (SELECT COALESCE(TO_CHAR(MAX(duration_s) * interval '1 second', 'HH24:MI:SS'), 'No data') FROM activities WHERE duration_s > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE)
  FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND duration_s > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE
UNION ALL SELECT 4, 'Most Calories',
  CASE WHEN MAX(calories) IS NULL THEN 'No data' WHEN MAX(calories) > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(calories) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND calories > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▲ ' || MAX(calories)::text || ' kcal' WHEN MAX(calories) < COALESCE((SELECT MAX(calories) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND calories > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▼ ' || MAX(calories)::text || ' kcal' ELSE MAX(calories)::text || ' kcal' END,
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(calories)::text || ' kcal', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND calories > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE),
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(calories)::text || ' kcal', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE calories > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE)
  FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND calories > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE
UNION ALL SELECT 5, 'Highest Avg Power',
  CASE WHEN MAX(avg_power) IS NULL THEN 'No data' WHEN MAX(avg_power) > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(avg_power) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_power > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▲ ' || MAX(avg_power)::text || ' W' WHEN MAX(avg_power) < COALESCE((SELECT MAX(avg_power) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_power > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▼ ' || MAX(avg_power)::text || ' W' ELSE MAX(avg_power)::text || ' W' END,
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(avg_power)::text || ' W', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_power > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE),
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(avg_power)::text || ' W', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE avg_power > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE)
  FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_power > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE
UNION ALL SELECT 6, 'Highest Avg Speed',
  CASE WHEN ROUND(MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1) IS NULL THEN 'No data' WHEN ROUND(MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1) > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▲ ' || ROUND(MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km/h' WHEN ROUND(MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1) < COALESCE((SELECT MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▼ ' || ROUND(MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km/h' ELSE ROUND(MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km/h' END,
  (SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km/h', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE),
  (SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km/h', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE)
  FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE
UNION ALL SELECT 7, 'Highest Avg HR',
  CASE WHEN MAX(avg_hr) IS NULL THEN 'No data' WHEN MAX(avg_hr) > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(avg_hr) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_hr > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▲ ' || MAX(avg_hr)::text || ' bpm' WHEN MAX(avg_hr) < COALESCE((SELECT MAX(avg_hr) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_hr > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▼ ' || MAX(avg_hr)::text || ' bpm' ELSE MAX(avg_hr)::text || ' bpm' END,
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(avg_hr)::text || ' bpm', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_hr > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE),
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(avg_hr)::text || ' bpm', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE avg_hr > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE)
  FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_hr > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE
) m ORDER BY m.ord;

panels.description:
Best values for each metric.

Period Best — highest in the selected time range.

▲ = better than previous equivalent period.

▼ = worse than previous equivalent period.

Previous Period Best — same duration window before the current one.

All Time Best — lifetime best (outdoor only).

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.lat AS "latitude", s.lng AS "longitude", a.date AS "time" FROM activity_streams s JOIN activities a ON a.id = s.activity_id WHERE s.lat IS NOT NULL AND s.lng IS NOT NULL AND a.is_indoor IS NOT TRUE AND s.time_offset % 10 = 0 ORDER BY a.date, s.time_offset LIMIT 500000;

SELECT id, name AS "Name", TO_CHAR(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Date", ROUND((distance_m / 1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Dist (km)", ROUND(elevation_m::numeric, 0) AS "Elev (m)", TO_CHAR(duration_s * interval '1 second', 'HH24:MI:SS') AS "Duration", ROUND(avg_speed_kmh::numeric, 1) AS "Speed", avg_hr AS "HR", avg_power AS "Power", avg_cadence AS "Cadence", CASE sport_type WHEN 'cycling_outdoor' THEN 'Outdoor' WHEN 'cycling_indoor' THEN 'Indoor' WHEN 'zwift' THEN 'Zwift' WHEN 'ebike' THEN 'E-Bike' ELSE sport_type END AS "Type", calories AS "Calories", ROUND(tss::numeric, 0) AS "TSS", EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM date - interval '1 hour')::bigint * 1000 AS from_ts, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM date + duration_s * interval '1 second' + interval '1 hour')::bigint * 1000 AS to_ts FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date DESC;

panels.title: TSS

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(tss), 0)::numeric, 0) AS "TSS" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date);

panels.description:
Training Stress Score

How much training load this period produced.

Calculated from power (preferred) or heart rate.

• < 150 — Easy week

• 150-300 — Moderate training

• 300-450 — Hard training

• 450+ — Very heavy load, watch recovery

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(avg_power)::numeric, 0) AS "Power" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_power > 0;
SELECT ROUND(AVG(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1) AS "Speed" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000;
SELECT ROUND(AVG(avg_hr)::numeric, 0) AS "HR" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_hr > 0;
SELECT ROUND(AVG(avg_cadence)::numeric, 0) AS "Cadence" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_cadence > 0;
SELECT MAX(max_hr) AS "Max HR" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND max_hr > 0;
SELECT MAX(max_power) AS "Max Power" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND max_power > 0;

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date)), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), 0))::numeric, 0) AS "Delta";

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE((SELECT SUM(distance_m)/1000.0 FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date)), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(distance_m)/1000.0 FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Delta";

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE((SELECT SUM(elevation_m) FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date)), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(elevation_m) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), 0))::numeric, 0) AS "Delta";

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE((SELECT SUM(duration_s) FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date)), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(duration_s) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), 0)) / 60.0::numeric, 0) AS "Delta";

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE((SELECT SUM(calories) FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND calories IS NOT NULL), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(calories) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND calories IS NOT NULL), 0))::numeric, 0) AS "Delta";

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE((SELECT SUM(tss) FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date)), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(tss) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), 0))::numeric, 0) AS "Delta";

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE((SELECT AVG(avg_power) FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_power > 0), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT AVG(avg_power) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_power > 0), 0))::numeric, 0) AS "Delta";

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE((SELECT AVG(avg_speed_kmh) FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT AVG(avg_speed_kmh) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000), 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Delta";

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE((SELECT AVG(avg_hr) FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_hr > 0), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT AVG(avg_hr) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_hr > 0), 0))::numeric, 0) AS "Delta";

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE((SELECT AVG(avg_cadence) FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_cadence > 0), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT AVG(avg_cadence) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_cadence > 0), 0))::numeric, 0) AS "Delta";

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE((SELECT MAX(max_power) FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND max_power > 0), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT MAX(max_power) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND max_power > 0), 0))::numeric, 0) AS "Delta";

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE((SELECT MAX(max_hr) FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND max_hr > 0), 0) - COALESCE((SELECT MAX(max_hr) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND max_hr > 0), 0))::numeric, 0) AS "Delta";

panels.title: vs Previous Period
panels.description:
Compares the current time range against the equivalent

previous window. E.g., if viewing Last 7 days, compares

against the 7 days before that.

🟢 Positive = improvement

🔴 Negative = decline

panels.title: Weekly Streak
panels.description:
Weekly Riding Streak

Consecutive weeks with at least one ride.

Counts backward from your most recent

riding week — doesn't break until a full

week passes without any cycling activity.

targets.rawSql: WITH weeks AS (SELECT DISTINCT date_trunc('week', date)::date AS week_start FROM activities WHERE date IS NOT NULL AND sport_type IN ('cycling_outdoor', 'cycling_indoor', 'zwift', 'ebike')), latest AS (SELECT MAX(week_start) AS start_from FROM weeks), numbered AS (SELECT week_start, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_start DESC) AS rn, ((SELECT start_from FROM latest) - ((ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_start DESC) - 1) * 7)::int) AS expected FROM weeks) SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Weeks" FROM numbered WHERE week_start = expected;

panels.title: Days Since Ride
panels.description:
Days Since Last Ride

🟢 0-2 days — Active

🟡 3-4 days — Rest period

🟠 5-6 days — Extended break

🔴 7+ days — Fitness declining

targets.rawSql: SELECT CURRENT_DATE - MAX(date::date) AS "Days" FROM activities WHERE sport_type IN ('cycling_outdoor', 'cycling_indoor', 'zwift', 'ebike');

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.distance_m) / 1000.0, 0) AS "Distance (km)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs  GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.elevation_m), 0) AS "Elevation (m)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs  GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.duration_s / 3600.0), 0) AS "Duration (h)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs  GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.tss), 0) AS "TSS" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.tss IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

panels.title: Avg Power & Avg HR

targets.rawSql: SELECT gs AS "time", ROUND(AVG(a.avg_power)::numeric, 0) AS "Power (W)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.avg_power > 0 GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", ROUND(AVG(a.avg_hr)::numeric, 0) AS "HR (bpm)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.avg_hr > 0 GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

panels.description: Efficiency trend — same power at lower HR over time = fitness improving.

panels.title: Avg Speed & Avg Cadence

targets.rawSql: SELECT gs AS "time", ROUND(AVG(a.avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1) AS "Speed (km/h)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND a.distance_m > 5000 GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", ROUND(AVG(a.avg_cadence)::numeric, 0) AS "Cadence (rpm)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.avg_cadence > 0 GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

panels.description: Technique — higher cadence at same speed = more efficient pedaling.

targets.rawSql: SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.calories), 0) AS "Calories (kcal)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.calories IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(COUNT(a.id), 0) AS "Rides" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs  GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;
